TimeEntry.Title: New Firewall installed in BWH-HQ
TimeEntry.Notes: MFA setup failed, troubleshot and fixed. The issue was because of tcp handshake time was set to a longer than standard, tcp handshake terminated prematurely and that caused the auth packet to fail.
